events: Black Dragon Guild suppression team attacks civilians
Civil Militia confronts Black Dragon Guild
Guild war breaks out in Babylon Square
Kim Gong-ja witnesses the chaos after leaving Ten Thousand Temple
cause_effect: Martial law imposed -> Black Dragon Guild hunters pour into streets
Guild leaders attacked -> guilds fight each other in confusion
Kim Gong-ja leaves Ten Thousand Temple -> discovers the hellish scene
chapters.notes: Chapter shows the aftermath of attacks on guild leaders. Black Dragon Guild is indiscriminately killing people without resident IDs or recent IDs. The Civil Militia tries to stop them but fails.

events: Yoo Soo-ha leaves to eliminate traitors and assassins
Ja Soo-jung shows Kim Gong-ja an IF world where she existed
Kim Gong-ja argues his world is more peaceful and better
Ja Soo-jung psychoanalyzes Kim Gong-ja's hatred for Yoo Soo-ha
Kim Gong-ja declares he will change Yoo Soo-ha
Kim Gong-ja demands reward using his first skill
Ja Soo-jung displays her 9 skill cards
Kim Gong-ja selects a skill card (cliffhanger)
skills: [I Want To Become Just Like You] (S+)
deaths: Yoo Soo-ha (killed by Kim Gong-ja in the past)
loops: Yoo Soo-ha performs regression by killing himself to return 24 hours
Kim Gong-ja went back 4,000 days in the past
cause_effect: Ja Soo-jung died and Kim Gong-ja died -> Yoo Soo-ha performed regression
Kim Gong-ja killed Yoo Soo-ha -> Ja Soo-jung argues he never tried to change him
Kim Gong-ja's weakness and betrayal by Yoo Soo-ha -> drove him to save others to prove he was different
Kim Gong-ja demands reward -> Ja Soo-jung displays her 9 skills
Kim Gong-ja provokes Ja Soo-jung -> she accepts the duel
chapters.notes: Heavy psychological analysis chapter. Ja Soo-jung argues Kim Gong-ja killed Yoo Soo-ha out of weakness and betrayal rather than necessity. Kim Gong-ja declares he will change Yoo Soo-ha better than Ja Soo-jung can, initiating a duel.

events: Ja Soo-jung explains the random selection rule for skill copying
Kim Gong-ja deduces the card pattern is Ja Soo-jung's family crest
Kim Gong-ja identifies [The One Loved By Dice] and rejects it
Kim Gong-ja uses reflections in Ja Soo-jung's purple eyes to read the cards
Kim Gong-ja selects [Earth Bone Dragon's Skull] (SSS+)
skills: [I Want To Become Just Like You]
[The One Loved by Dice] (SSS - Heavenly Luck)
[Earth Bone Dragon's Skull] (SSS+ - memory archive and body recreation)
cause_effect: Kim Gong-ja enhances vision with aura -> can read reflections in Ja Soo-jung's purple eyes
Reading reflections -> identifies all 9 skill cards without flipping them
Selecting [Earth Bone Dragon's Skull] -> gains ability to archive memories and recreate bodies from save points
chapters.notes: Kim Gong-ja uses a clever trick to identify all cards by reading their reflections in Ja Soo-jung's mirror-like purple eyes. He rejects the luck-based skill and chooses Earth Bone Dragon's Skull, which allows creating memory 'save points' and recreating bodies.
